response.justification: Aisha is a seasoned generalist engineer with ~18 years of software development experience, strong TypeScript/Node.js skills, and recent hands-on exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and her AI/GenAI experience only dates from 2025. There is no demonstrated experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks, and Python is notably absent from her skill list. Her customer-facing leadership evidence is limited to workshops and training rather than enterprise technical discovery.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks
Deep full-stack and systems experience (TypeScript, Node.js, low-latency services, AWS CDK)
Proven mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, courses, conference talks)
concerns: Falls far short of the 8+ years of AI-solution development requirement (~1 year of AI-adjacent work)
No evidence of RAG, vector database, LLM evaluation, or multi-agent framework experience
Python not listed among skills, and limited enterprise customer-facing discovery/consulting experience

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic tooling exposure at current role
Missing RAG/vector DB and LLM evaluation expertise
